_comment: Master list of every live URL on the old WordPress site (easyauto.ae). Every page on the new site MUST answer these 1:1 or 301-redirect. Generated in Step 1 (SEO baseline).
author: https://easyauto.ae/author/admin/
https://easyauto.ae/author/dev/

orphan_categories._comment: Category slugs that are LIVE/indexed on the old site but have NO businesses in our extract. These will 404 on the new site unless 301-redirected. Map each to the nearest new taxonomy category in Step 3.

legacy_duplicate_urls._comment: Old WP permalinks that should 301 to their canonical new URL (Step 3/8).

redirects.reason: legacy post permalink duplicates the /news/ post
default WP sample post, no value
default WP blog category, no value

low_value_wp_pages._comment: WordPress plugin/utility pages. Most have no new-site equivalent yet. Auth/submit ones map to Step 7 pages; the rest 301 to home or the relevant index.

author_urls._comment: WP author archives — noindex/redirect to home on the new site.
